chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 5593 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 23372/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026 Mr. Rashid Mureed, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Abdullah Nizamani, Advocate for Respondents (DRAP) Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- The case of the Petitioner is that a Hardship Application (Annexure “C” at page-31) has been moved before the Director Costing & Pricing, Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan, Islamabad, seeking revision of the price of the Product specified therein, which has not been attended to by the functionary. He submits that the Petitioner merely seeks that the Application be decided in accordance with law without undue delay. Learned counsel for the DRAP acknowledges that such Application remains pending. Under the circumstances, The Petition stands disposed of with the direction that such Application be decided through a speaking order after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner without undue delay, preferably within a period of 45 days from today. Judge Judge Ayaz
